basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur has released the official Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 on 16 May 2026 at the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of First Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degrees along with relevant experience in community-based projects, data collection, budget handling, and data management can attend the walk-in interview on 28 M

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree including the integrated PG degrees, Previous experience of at least five years for working in community-based projects with data collection, budget handling, and data management, Proficiency in Hindi, English and local language
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): Essential: First Class Post Graduate Degree including the integrated PG degrees. Desirable: Previous experience of at least five years for working in community-based projects with data collection, budget handling, and data management. Proficiency in Hindi, English and local language.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56000/- + HRA as admissible Per Month

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Screening/Scrutiny Test (if required by Competent Authority)

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for this position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 28 May 2026. Candidates should attend the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is a First Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degrees. Desirable qualifications include experience in community-based projects and language proficiency.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56000/- + HRA as admissible per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview, and a Screening/Scrutiny Test may be conducted if required.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.
